creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 239244
Screenshot: preparing to switch on

(In reply to Marek Zarychta from comment #0)

> … webcam is not detected, …

Not reproducible here. 

In a channel:

1. Meet menu
2. Meet now
3. switch on
